headlines.title: Hungarians vote in parliamentary election challenging Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule
headlines.summary: Hungarians cast ballots Sunday in a pivotal vote where opposition leader Péter Magyar challenges Prime Minister Viktor Orbán's 16-year nationalist rule. Polls show tight race. Outcome shapes Europe's populist landscape and draws global attention.

framings.angle: Focused on polls favoring challenger Péter Magyar against defiant Orbán
Portrayed Orban facing tight race from opposition leader Peter Magyar
Highlighted potential end to Orban's rule as Trump-Putin ally
Provided background on globally watched vote's populist implications
Stressed Orban faces toughest election challenge in many years
Noted European scrutiny and Trump backing for Orban's rule

headlines.title: US and Iran delegations hold direct talks in Pakistan to end six-week war
headlines.summary: US and Iran negotiate directly in Islamabad for first time since 1979 to halt conflict disrupting Middle East and energy supplies. US clears Hormuz mines; no deal yet. Pakistan mediates; success stabilizes region.

framings.angle: Reported negotiations underway with US clearing Strait of Hormuz mines
Outlined key takeaways from marathon talks without reaching deal
Emphasized Pakistan facilitating talks and urging ceasefire continuation

headlines.title: Rwanda-backed rebels enter Goma displacing over 1 million in Congo city
headlines.summary: Rwanda-backed rebels overrun Congolese troops entering Goma aid hub; gunfire and shelling displace over 1 million residents inside city. U.N. monitors crisis. Threatens humanitarian operations and escalates regional conflict.

headlines.title: Israel allows Palestinians to return to northern Gaza after hostage breakthrough
headlines.summary: Israel permits displaced Palestinians to cross bisecting military zone back to northern Gaza following broken hostage release deadlock. Thousands affected. Eases humanitarian strain but tensions persist in enclave.

headlines.title: NATO coordinates first response after sabotage severs Baltic Sea cable
headlines.summary: NATO launches coordinated action targeting suspected sabotage campaign on critical infrastructure following another deep-sea cable cut in Baltic Sea. Alliance members affected. Bolsters defenses against hybrid threats.

headlines.title: Artemis II astronauts return home after record-breaking moon flyby mission
headlines.summary: NASA's Artemis II crew including Reid Wiseman, Christina Koch, Jeremy Hansen, Victor Glover lands safely post-moon orbit in Pacific off California. Public cheers mission. Paves way for future lunar landings.

headlines.title: Police shoot knife-wielding man dead after he stabs 3 at New York subway
headlines.summary: Man stabs 3 at 42nd Street-Grand Central station; responding NYPD officers shoot him fatally on platform. Victims hospitalized. Raises transit safety concerns in major U.S. city.

headlines.title: Nigeria convicts 386 terror suspects in major Islamist militants trial
headlines.summary: Nigerian prosecutors secure 386 convictions from hundreds of Islamist suspects amid Boko Haram insurgency trial. Affects national security. Signals intensified judicial crackdown on extremism.
